reviews.comment:
Fui a sacar el registro internacional. La atención fue muy buena y el trámite no duró más de 15 min

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my international driver's license. The service was excellent and the process took no more than 15 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbXYyOEJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Necesite parar a pasar una valija de un auto a otro y ya la seguridad me estaba echando, pensé que las estaciones del acá son para ayudar a los socios del automóvil club. Es la segunda vez que me pasa.
Espero que al habilitar el full te permitan estacionar, yo gaste 5800 de nafta y casi me echan

(Translated by Google)
I needed to stop to transfer a suitcase from one car to another, and security was already trying to kick me out. I thought the gas stations here were only for helping members of the automobile club. This is the second time it's happened to me. I hope that when you activate the full tank, they'll let you park. I spent 5800 pesos on gas and they almost kicked me out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4cC1iRHFBRRAB
